title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: Educational video from AWS Developers explaining AWS Identity and Access Management fundamentals, including users, roles, policies, and the principle of least privilege. Covers common beginner mistakes like overly permissive access and recommends IAM Access Analyzer for permission validation.
